note: PM Surya Ghar subsidy is computed using MNRE residential slab rates (up to 3 kW).
Surya Gujarat (GEDA) is modeled as a percent support on eligible system cost.
PM KUSUM (B & C) is modeled as agriculture-focused capital support on eligible capacity.
PM KUSUM (A) is modeled as decentralized plant support on eligible project cost.
Green Credit Programme is modeled as a monetizable credit-equivalent benefit on project cost.
